codeReview.summary: The change aligns the code with the documented boundary by removing identity-owned username state from the domain, Room entity, mapper, and password identity editor, while adding a 6->7 migration plus focused migration coverage proving host usernames remain authoritative.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, mission guidance, and relevant architecture/skill docs. The implementation cleanly removes redundant identity username state, preserves host-owned username persistence through migration, and I found no actionable issues in the reviewed scope.
